description: Self-build roadmap consumed by SelfBuildLoop — one task at a time, AI patches and tests each one.

tasks.title: Validate module loader discovers all installed modules
tasks.description: After setup_modules.py runs, verify ModuleLoader.load_all() finds every module directory and registers its tools.json entries into the ToolRegistry without errors.

tasks.title: Add missing __init__.py stubs for all module packages
tasks.description: Each module under modules/ that exposes Python callables needs an __init__.py so importlib.import_module() can resolve function paths in tool definitions.

tasks.title: Write unit tests for ToolRegistry register/get/list_tools
tasks.description: tests/test_tool_registry.py: register a stub tool definition, assert get() returns it, assert list_tools() contains it, assert overwrite by same name works.

tasks.title: Write unit tests for PermissionSystem path and tool checks
tasks.description: tests/test_permission.py: blocked_dirs rejects paths inside them, allowed_dirs accepts paths inside them, block_tool() prevents execution.

tasks.title: Add health_check() method to all LLM backend classes
tasks.description: Each LLM backend (OllamaLLM, ApiLLM, etc.) should implement health_check() -> bool that pings the backend's /health or equivalent endpoint with a 3-second timeout. Returns True if reachable.

tasks.title: Add list_models() method to OllamaLLM and ApiLLM
tasks.description: OllamaLLM.list_models() calls GET /api/tags on the Ollama server and returns a list of model name strings. ApiLLM.list_models() calls GET /v1/models on the OpenAI-compatible endpoint.

tasks.title: Factory creates fallback chain: try configured backend, else local stub
tasks.description: In create_llm(), if the configured backend raises on instantiation or health_check() returns False, log a warning and return LocalLLM() as a safe fallback so the server always starts.

tasks.title: Agent.run() returns structured AgentResult instead of bare string
tasks.description: Define AgentResult(reply: str, tool_calls: list, iterations: int, truncated: bool). Agent.run() returns AgentResult. All callers (server.py /chat) adapt to .reply. Allows the IDE to display tool_calls as a collapsible step list.

tasks.title: Tool call argument coercion: JSON-string args auto-parsed to dict
tasks.description: In Agent._execute_tool(), if arguments is a str, attempt json.loads(). If that also fails, wrap as {"input": arguments}. Log a debug warning. Prevents crashes when some LLMs return stringified JSON.

tasks.title: Cap total tool-call chain tokens: truncate history after 6000 chars
tasks.description: In Agent._build_messages(), if the combined content of history entries exceeds 6000 characters, keep only the most recent entries that fit. Prevents context-window overflow on long agentic runs.

tasks.title: Write integration test: agent completes a read-file + summarise task
tasks.description: tests/test_agent_integration.py: create a temp workspace file, run agent with prompt 'Summarise workspace/hello.txt', assert response mentions the file content. Uses LocalLLM stub.

tasks.title: Add GET /files endpoint: recursive file tree for workspace/ and projects/
tasks.description: Returns JSON tree matching the schema expected by the Monaco IDE file explorer: [{type:'dir'|'file', name, path, children?, size?}]. Depth capped at 4. Hidden files (dot-prefixed) excluded.

tasks.title: Add GET /files/read and POST /files/write with path-traversal guards
tasks.description: Both endpoints resolve paths relative to workspace/ or projects/ only. Reject any path that resolves outside those roots with HTTP 400. write creates parent directories.

tasks.title: Add streaming chat via Server-Sent Events: GET /chat/stream
tasks.description: Accepts same body as POST /chat. Returns SSE stream of token chunks as {data: token} events, ending with {data: '[DONE]'}. Uses LLM.stream_chat() if implemented, else yields the full response as one event.

tasks.title: Add WebSocket /ws/run for streaming build/run output to IDE
tasks.description: Accepts {command, cwd} JSON message after WS handshake. Runs the command via asyncio.create_subprocess_shell, streams stdout+stderr line-by-line as text frames, sends {type:'exit',code:N} JSON frame on completion.

tasks.title: Implement archive_manager.py in AtlasAI Engine
tasks.description: Port archive_manager.py from PythonBridge to AtlasAI Engine/core/. ArchiveEntry dataclass, Archive.add_entry, Archive.search, Archive.get_context. Singleton via get_archive().

tasks.title: Integrate archive context into Agent._build_messages()
tasks.description: In Agent._build_messages(), call get_archive().get_context(state.prompt, max_chars=2000) and if non-empty, append it to the system prompt after the project context block.

tasks.title: Start archive watcher in server.py lifespan
tasks.description: In the lifespan async context manager of AtlasAI Engine/server.py, call get_archive().start_watcher(library_paths) in a background thread after loading library paths from library_manager.get_library_paths().

tasks.title: Add archive REST endpoints to AtlasAI Engine server
tasks.description: GET /archive (paginated list), POST /archive/rebuild (full re-index), GET /archive/search?q=..., GET /archive/export (markdown), DELETE /archive/entry/{id}.

tasks.title: Add POST /self-build/run endpoint to AtlasAI Engine server
tasks.description: Starts SelfBuildLoop.run() in a background asyncio task. Streams log events via a queue. Returns {status:'started', task_id}. If already running returns {status:'already_running'}.

tasks.title: Add GET /self-build/log WebSocket for live self-build output
tasks.description: WebSocket endpoint that reads from the SelfBuildLoop event queue and forwards each line to the connected client. IDE roadmap panel subscribes to this for live progress.

tasks.title: Validate SelfBuildLoop with a trivial roadmap task (add docstring)
tasks.description: Create tests/test_self_build.py with a minimal roadmap containing one task: 'Add module-level docstring to core/task_runner.py'. Run SelfBuildLoop, assert the file is modified and the test suite still passes.
